auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Getnote API key sent with the Authorization header. Create an app in the official open platform: https://www.biji.com/openapi.

extraFields.label: Client ID
extraFields.description: Getnote Client ID sent with the X-Client-ID header. It is shown with the API key after you create an app in the official open platform: https://www.biji.com/openapi.

actions.name: add_note_tags
actions.description: Add one or more tags to a Getnote note.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding tags to a Getnote note.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: add_notes_to_knowledge_base
actions.description: Add up to 20 notes to one Getnote knowledge base. Subscribed knowledge bases are read-only unless the user is an admin.

items.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding notes to a Getnote knowledge base.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: create_knowledge_base
actions.description: Create a Getnote knowledge base. Upstream limits creation to 50 per day.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Getnote knowledge base.

topic.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: delete_note
actions.description: Move a Getnote note to trash.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

inputSchema.description: Input containing one Getnote note ID.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: follow_live
actions.description: Subscribe a Dedao live channel link into one Getnote knowledge base. Upstream currently supports Dedao App live links.

inputSchema.description: Input for following a Dedao live channel in Getnote.

item.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: get_blogger_content
actions.description: Get one Getnote blogger content detail, including original text when returned.

postId.description: Blogger post ID alias returned by list_blogger_contents.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Getnote blogger content item.

item.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: get_live_detail
actions.description: Get one Getnote live detail, including AI summary and transcript when returned.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Getnote live detail.

item.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: get_note
actions.description: Get one Getnote note detail, including fields that are not present in lists.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

imageQuality.description: Set to `original` to request original image links.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Getnote note.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

note.description: Detailed note object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: get_save_task
actions.description: Check the progress of an asynchronous Getnote link or image save task.

inputSchema.description: Input for checking Getnote save task progress.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: list_blogger_contents
actions.description: List content items for a subscribed blogger in a Getnote knowledge base.

followId.description: Blogger follow ID returned by list_knowledge_base_bloggers.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Getnote blogger contents.

items.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: list_knowledge_base_bloggers
actions.description: List bloggers subscribed in one Getnote knowledge base.

inputSchema.description: Input for a page-based knowledge base endpoint.

items.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: list_knowledge_base_lives
actions.description: List completed live sessions in one Getnote knowledge base.

inputSchema.description: Input for a page-based knowledge base endpoint.

items.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: list_knowledge_base_notes
actions.description: List notes in one Getnote knowledge base.

inputSchema.description: Input for a page-based knowledge base endpoint.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

items.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

topics.description: Knowledge base topics returned for the note.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Getnote knowledge base notes response.

actions.name: list_knowledge_bases
actions.description: List knowledge bases owned by the authenticated Getnote account.

inputSchema.description: Input for page-based Getnote list endpoints.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Getnote knowledge base list response.

actions.name: list_note_tags
actions.description: List tags attached to one Getnote note.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

inputSchema.description: Input containing one Getnote note ID.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Getnote note tag list response.

actions.name: list_notes
actions.description: List recent Getnote notes using the official cursor pagination endpoint.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous page.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Getnote notes.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

items.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

topics.description: Knowledge base topics returned for the note.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: list_subscribed_knowledge_bases
actions.description: List knowledge bases subscribed by the authenticated Getnote account. These are read-only unless the user is an admin.

inputSchema.description: Input for page-based Getnote list endpoints.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Getnote knowledge base list response.

actions.name: remove_note_tag
actions.description: Remove one Getnote tag by tag ID. System tags cannot be deleted upstream.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

tagId.description: Tag ID to remove, as returned by list_note_tags or note detail.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing a tag from a Getnote note.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: remove_notes_from_knowledge_base
actions.description: Remove notes from one Getnote knowledge base.

items.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing notes from a Getnote knowledge base.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: save_note
actions.description: Save a plain-text, link, or image-URL note to Getnote. Plain text and Getnote share links are synchronous; regular links and image notes may return tasks.

content.description: Markdown content or image note description.

tags.description: Tag names to attach to the note.

parentId.description: Parent note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

linkUrl.description: URL to save when noteType is `link`.

imageUrls.description: Image URLs to save when noteType is `img_text`; use URLs from Getnote upload tokens or other accessible image URLs.

topicId.description: Knowledge base topic ID to save the note into.

inputSchema.description: Input for saving a text, link, or image-URL note to Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

tasks.description: Asynchronous save tasks returned by Getnote.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: search_notes
actions.description: Run Getnote semantic search globally, or within one knowledge base when topicId is provided.

topicId.description: Knowledge base topic ID for scoped search.

topK.description: Maximum number of results to return. Getnote allows up to 10.

inputSchema.description: Input for Getnote semantic search.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: share_note
actions.description: Generate or retrieve the idempotent public share link for a Getnote note.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

excludeAudio.description: Whether to exclude audio from the public share.

inputSchema.description: Input for generating a Getnote share link.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.

actions.name: update_note
actions.description: Update a Getnote note title, plain-text content, or tags. Tags replace the existing tag list.

noteId.description: Getnote note ID. Treat this as a string because upstream IDs are int64.

content.description: New note content. Upstream only supports this for plain-text notes.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Getnote note.

raw.description: Raw upstream object returned by Getnote.
